title: SLOVENIA enforcement action against Utility Company (6,600)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Slovenian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 6,600 on a utility company and a responsible person within the company. The company tracked its employees using GPS trackers installed in company vehicles which ran continuously and indiscriminately. The controller had no legal basis for this data pro...
